response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for the role; most recent work is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, outdated C++ stint at National Instruments.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse platforms and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: Minimal recent C++ experience; no evidence of STL, concurrency, or industrial systems
No exposure to key required technologies: MQTT, REST in industrial context, IEC 62443, or OPC UA
Primary stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js); lacks cloud/on-prem industrial platform background
